name: Stay of Enforcement for Departing Aliens

eligibility.description: Non-U.S. citizens departing the United States who obtain a determination that collection is not jeopardized by their departure.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Enforcement of immediate tax payment can be stayed until the normal due date if the Secretary determines the alien's departure does not jeopardize collection.
